description: is operator: scope + expression forms, including is-in

tests.name: scope_is_match
tests.description: principal is User matches when principal type is User
tests.policy: permit (principal is User, action, resource);

tests.name: scope_is_mismatch
tests.description: principal is Admin does not match User principal
tests.policy: permit (principal is Admin, action, resource);

tests.name: scope_is_resource
tests.description: resource is Endpoint matches Endpoint resource
tests.policy: permit (principal, action, resource is Endpoint);

tests.name: scope_is_resource_mismatch
tests.description: resource is Document does not match Endpoint
tests.policy: permit (principal, action, resource is Document);

tests.name: scope_is_in_self
tests.description: principal is User in User::"alice" matches same entity
tests.policy: permit (principal is User in User::"alice", action, resource);

tests.name: scope_is_in_different_id
tests.description: principal is User in User::"bob" does not match alice
tests.policy: permit (principal is User in User::"bob", action, resource);

tests.name: scope_is_in_different_type
tests.description: principal is User in Group::"admin" does not match User::"alice"
tests.policy: permit (principal is User in Group::"admin", action, resource);

tests.name: scope_is_with_namespace
tests.description: namespaced type name in scope
tests.policy: permit (principal is NS::User, action, resource);

tests.name: scope_is_forbid
tests.description: forbid principal is ServiceAccount blocks matching principal
tests.policy:
forbid (principal is ServiceAccount, action, resource);
permit (principal, action, resource);

tests.name: scope_is_forbid_non_match
tests.description: forbid scope is does not block non-matching principal
tests.policy:
forbid (principal is ServiceAccount, action, resource);
permit (principal, action, resource);

tests.name: expr_is_match
tests.description: expression principal is User in when clause
tests.policy: permit (principal, action, resource) when { principal is User };

tests.name: expr_is_mismatch
tests.description: expression principal is Admin does not match
tests.policy: permit (principal, action, resource) when { principal is Admin };

tests.name: expr_is_negated
tests.description: negated expression !(principal is Admin)
tests.policy: permit (principal, action, resource) when { !(principal is Admin) };

tests.name: expr_is_with_and
tests.description: expression is combined with && on attribute
tests.policy: permit (principal, action, resource) when { principal is User && principal.role == "viewer" };

tests.name: expr_is_in_self
tests.description: expression principal is User in User::"alice" matches
tests.policy: permit (principal, action, resource) when { principal is User in User::"alice" };

tests.name: expr_is_in_other
tests.description: expression principal is User in User::"bob" does not match
tests.policy: permit (principal, action, resource) when { principal is User in User::"bob" };

tests.name: expr_is_on_resource
tests.description: expression resource is Endpoint evaluates on resource var
tests.policy: permit (principal, action, resource) when { resource is Endpoint };

tests.name: expr_is_on_action
tests.description: expression action is Action matches action type
tests.policy: permit (principal, action, resource) when { action is Action };

tests.name: use_case_viewer
tests.description: use case 9: permit User principal reading with role viewer
tests.policy: permit (principal is User, action == Action::"GET", resource) when { principal.role == "viewer" };

tests.name: use_case_service_account_denied
tests.description: use case 10: forbid ServiceAccount on DELETE
tests.policy:
forbid (principal is ServiceAccount, action in [Action::"DELETE", Action::"PUT"], resource);
permit (principal, action, resource);
